title: Excalibur | Illager Invasion Support
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24b7c6a5cb700784e7e4072e54b143ec0f233f9f.png)

This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Illager Invasion](https://modrinth.com/mod/illager-invasion) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**
- Redesigned all items blocks and entities.
- GUIs for Excalibur style

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
- Fuzs - Creator of _Illager Invasion_


If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-illager-invasion-support)
